popularStory.headline: CHICHESTER FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
CHICHESTER FAMILY

July 18, 2016



1.RICHARD CHICHESTER, ESQ. (1424-1498)
MARGARET KEYNES (1425- )

RICHARD CHICHESTER, ESQ. was born 23 February 1424, Raleigh, Barnstaple, Devonshire, England, to Si …

zh.Barnstaple, Devon, England: 英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Chichester於大約1447年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Richard Chichester24歲，母親Margaret Keynes23歲。他於1471年與Christiana Paulet在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年12月24日在英國戴文享年52歲。

zh-hans.Raleigh, Devon: 加拿大纽芬兰与拉布拉多省雷利
zh-hans.Barnstaple, Devon, England: 英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Chichester于大约1447年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Richard Chichester24岁，母亲Margaret Keynes23岁。他于1471年与Christiana Paulet在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年12月24日在英国戴文享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chichester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Chichester in Sussex, probably named with the Old English personal name Cissa + Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort’. (Cissa is attested as the name of a historical person; it is of uncertain etymology.) Alternatively, the first element may be an Old English word cisse ‘gravelly feature’.

variants.name: Chidester
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Chichester  . It is not found in English records.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Chichester was born about 1447, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Chichester, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Keynes, was 23. He married Christiana Paulet in 1471, in Barnstaple, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 December 1498, in Devon, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Chichester est né environ 1447, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Chichester, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Keynes, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Paulet en 1471, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1498, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Chichester um 1447 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Chichester 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Keynes 23. Er hat 1471 in Barnstaple, Devon, England Christiana Paulet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1498 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Chichester è nato il circa 1447 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Chichester, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Keynes, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Paulet nel 1471, nel Barnstaple, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 dicembre 1498, nel Devon, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Chichesterが約1447年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Richard Chichesterは24歳，母Margaret Keynesは23歳であった。1471年にイギリスデボンバーンスタプルでChristiana Pauletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年12月24日にイギリスデボンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Chichester(이)가 대략 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Chichester(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Keynes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1471년 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 Christiana Paulet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 12월 24일 영국 데폰에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Chichester nasceu aproximadamente 1447, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Chichester, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Keynes, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Paulet em 1471, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1498, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Chichester родился около 1447 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Chichester было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Keynes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Paulet в 1471 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 декабря 1498 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Chichester nació aproximadamente 1447, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Chichester, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Keynes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Christiana Paulet en 1471, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1498, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
